result.summary: The Iran war is causing economic uncertainty and recession fears in the US, with a sharp fall in GDP growth to 0.5% in Q4 2025. The ceasefire negotiated by Trump is fragile and may not hold.
result.reasoning: The articles suggest that the Iran war is having a significant impact on the US economy, leading to recession fears and a fragile ceasefire.

signals.text: Sharp fall in US GDP growth to 0.5% in Q4 2025
American voters are cautiously embracing Trump's fragile ceasefire with Iran

best.description: Iran war ends in a negotiated ceasefire

likely.description: Iran war escalates into full-scale conflict

worst.description: Iran war leads to global economic collapse

civilian_impact.displacement: Significant displacement expected in the Middle East

sources.name: US Bureau of Economic Analysis
sources.title: US GDP growth crashes to 0.5% in Q4 2025

sources.name: Daily Mail JL Partners poll
sources.title: Americans reveal their verdict on Trump's shaky ceasefire with Iran and whether it'll last
